title: Bridge Essay: Neuroecology of cartilaginous fishes: the functional implications of brain scali

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Neuroecology of cartilaginous fishes: the functional implications of brain scaling.** — J Fish Biol. PMID: 22497414. DOI: 10.1111/j.1095-8649.2012.03254.x. It is awidely accepted view that neural development can reflect morphological adaptations and sensory specializations. The aim of this review is to give abroad overview of the current status of brain data available for cartilaginous fishes and examine how perspectives on allometric scaling of brain size across this group of fishes has changed within the last 50 years with the addition of new data and more rigorous statistical analyses.
